tasks.subject: Task 0: Install Resend + environment setup + email utility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the Resend package, document required env vars, and create the email-sending utility.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/email.ts`
- Create: `.env.example`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `resend` package installed
- [ ] `.env.example` documents all 5 new variables
- [ ] `src/lib/email.ts` exports `sendVerificationEmail` and `sendPasswordResetEmail`

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors in `src/lib/email.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/email.ts", ".env.example"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resend package installed", ".env.example created", "email.ts exports sendVerificationEmail and sendPasswordResetEmail"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Database schema migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend Prisma schema with new User fields and two token models, then migrate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `prisma/schema.prisma`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `User.password` is nullable
- [ ] User has `emailVerified DateTime?` and `oauthProvider String?`
- [ ] `EmailVerificationToken` model added
- [ ] `PasswordResetToken` model added
- [ ] Migration runs without error

**Verify:** `npx prisma migrate status` → all migrations applied

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma migrate status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["password nullable", "emailVerified and oauthProvider on User", "EmailVerificationToken model", "PasswordResetToken model", "migration applied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Token utilities with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `src/lib/tokens.ts` with token creation functions and full test coverage.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/lib/tokens.ts`
- Create: `src/lib/tokens.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `createVerificationToken(userId)` cleans old tokens, creates new with 24h expiry
- [ ] `createPasswordResetToken(email)` cleans old tokens, creates new with 1h expiry
- [ ] 4 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/lib/tokens.test.ts` → 4 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/tokens.ts", "src/lib/tokens.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/lib/tokens.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createVerificationToken exported", "createPasswordResetToken exported", "4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update auth.ts — emailVerified in session + nullable password guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose `emailVerified` in JWT/session; guard credentials login against Google users.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/auth.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `authorize` returns null when `user.password` is null
- [ ] `jwt` callback stores `emailVerified`
- [ ] `session` callback puts `emailVerified` on session.user

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/auth.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["password null guard in authorize", "emailVerified in jwt", "emailVerified in session"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update registration route — create token + send email
tasks.description:
**Goal:** After user creation, generate verification token and send email. Email failures don't block registration.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/register/route.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/api/register/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] On success: `createVerificationToken` and `sendVerificationEmail` called
- [ ] Email throw → still returns 200
- [ ] 5 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/register/route.test.ts` → 5 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/register/route.ts", "src/app/api/register/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/register/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["token created on registration", "email sent on registration", "email failure returns 200", "5 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Email verification API routes with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create GET /api/verify-email and POST /api/resend-verification.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/verify-email/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/verify-email/route.test.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/resend-verification/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/resend-verification/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Valid token → user verified, redirect /tasks
- [ ] Expired token → redirect /verify-email?error=expired
- [ ] Resend: 401 without auth
- [ ] Resend: new token + email sent
- [ ] 7 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/verify-email src/app/api/resend-verification` → 7 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/verify-email/route.ts", "src/app/api/verify-email/route.test.ts", "src/app/api/resend-verification/route.ts", "src/app/api/resend-verification/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/verify-email src/app/api/resend-verification", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid token verifies user", "expired token redirects with error", "resend requires auth", "7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Email verification UI — page + banner + tasks integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verification error page, orange banner component, banner wired into /tasks.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/verify-email/page.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/EmailVerificationBanner.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/tasks/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /verify-email?error=expired shows proper message
- [ ] Banner shows for unverified users
- [ ] Resend button works
- [ ] Dismiss hides banner (state only)

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → register → banner visible on /tasks

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/verify-email/page.tsx", "src/components/EmailVerificationBanner.tsx", "src/app/tasks/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["verify-email error page works", "banner shows for unverified users", "resend button sends email", "dismiss hides banner"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Password reset API routes with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /api/forgot-password and POST /api/reset-password.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/api/forgot-password/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/forgot-password/route.test.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/reset-password/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Unknown email → 200, no token
- [ ] Google user → 200, no token
- [ ] Valid user → token + email sent
- [ ] Invalid/expired reset token → 400
- [ ] Valid reset → password updated, token deleted
- [ ] 7 tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/forgot-password src/app/api/reset-password` → 7 passed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/forgot-password/route.ts", "src/app/api/forgot-password/route.test.ts", "src/app/api/reset-password/route.ts", "src/app/api/reset-password/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/forgot-password src/app/api/reset-password", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unknown email returns 200", "google user blocked silently", "valid user gets email", "7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Password reset pages
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /forgot-password form page and /reset-password page.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/app/forgot-password/page.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/reset-password/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] /forgot-password: any email shows success (no enumeration)
- [ ] /reset-password without token shows invalid message
- [ ] /reset-password: mismatch → error, success → confirmation
- [ ] Password < 8 blocked client-side

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → E2E: request reset → use link from Resend dashboard → login with new password

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/forgot-password/page.tsx", "src/app/reset-password/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["forgot-password always shows success", "reset-password handles missing token", "password mismatch error shown", "successful reset enables login"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Google OAuth — auth + UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Google provider in NextAuth, user creation/linking, Google buttons on login/register, forgot password link.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/auth.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/login/page.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/register/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Google button on login and register pages
- [ ] New Google user created with emailVerified, no password
- [ ] Existing credentials user linked on Google sign-in
- [ ] Забыли пароль? link on login page
- [ ] All previous tests still pass

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → Google OAuth flow lands on /tasks, no banner; `npx vitest run` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/auth.ts", "src/app/login/page.tsx", "src/app/register/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Google button on login", "Google button on register", "new Google user created correctly", "existing user linked", "all tests pass"]}
```
